content.question: If 6-/8-year gimnázium selection is eliminated, what proportion of the observed educational inequality would be displaced into church-school admissions discretion, private tutoring markets, or residential sorting, versus genuinely reduced?
content.reduction_path: Implement piloted track elimination in municipalities where church-school market share is known and stable; monitor enrollment patterns and achievement distribution across state/church/private sectors before and after 18-24 months post-reform; compare displacement ratio against baseline inequality reduction target.
